metadata.name: meridian
metadata.description: Meridian - binary options prediction market on Solana

instructions.name: close_oracle
docs: Recovery: close a bricked oracle PDA (legacy `MockOracle` discriminator)
so `update_oracle` can re-create it with the current discriminator.

instructions.name: close_settled_book
docs: Rent reclamation: close a SETTLED market's (empty) order book and
return its lamports to the admin. See close_settled_book.rs.

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Program is paused by admin

errors.name: AlreadySettled
errors.msg: Market is already settled

errors.name: NotSettled
errors.msg: Market is not yet settled

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow

errors.name: InvalidStrike
errors.msg: Strike price is invalid

errors.name: OraclesStale
errors.msg: Oracle price is too stale to use

errors.name: OracleConfidenceWide
errors.msg: Oracle confidence band is too wide

errors.name: AdminRequired
errors.msg: This instruction requires the admin signer

errors.name: TimeGateNotElapsed
errors.msg: Time gate has not elapsed (e.g. settle before expiry, or override before 1h delay)

errors.name: OrderBookFullForSide
errors.msg: Order book is full for this side

errors.name: OrderNotFound
errors.msg: Order not found at given index

errors.name: InvalidOrderIndex
errors.msg: Order index out of range

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Insufficient funds in account or vault

errors.name: NotEnoughBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for requested operation

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Invalid price (must be 1..=99 cents on a $1.00 binary)

errors.name: PriceOutOfRange
errors.msg: Price out of range (must be 1..=99 cents)

errors.name: SizeMustBeNonZero
errors.msg: Size must be non-zero

errors.name: NotOrderOwner
errors.msg: Caller is not the order owner

errors.name: InvalidTicker
errors.msg: Ticker string is invalid or too long

errors.name: InvalidOracleAuthority
errors.msg: Oracle authority mismatch

errors.name: InvalidRedeemSide
errors.msg: Settlement outcome mismatch (token side cannot redeem against current outcome)

errors.name: NotWinningSide
errors.msg: Settlement outcome was not the winning side

errors.name: OracleNegativePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is negative

errors.name: OracleInvalidExpo
errors.msg: Oracle exponent invalid for cents conversion

errors.name: OrderBookFull
errors.msg: Order book is full

errors.name: InvalidFeeDestination
errors.msg: Fee destination USDC ATA does not match config.fee_destination

errors.name: InvalidRiskParam
errors.msg: Invalid risk parameter (staleness must be > 0; confidence bps in 1..=10000)

errors.name: BothSidesHeld
errors.msg: Cannot hold both YES and NO on the same strike at once

errors.name: SingleSidedGuardMissing
errors.msg: Buying YES while holding NO requires a trailing assert_single_sided in the same transaction

errors.name: InvalidConfigLayout
errors.msg: Config account is not in a migratable layout (wrong owner or too small)

errors.name: MarketNotSettled
errors.msg: Market must be settled before its book can be closed

errors.name: OrderBookNotEmpty
errors.msg: Order book still has resting orders — cancel them before closing
